content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add Editor Process Monitoring to Click's Edit Function' - adding monitor_process param to click.edit(). Will touch src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class) and src/click/termui.py (edit function signature). Will ping before major structural changes.

agent2: my feature (monitor_process) touches Editor.__init__ signature (adding monitor_process param) and Editor.edit_file (wrapping subprocess.Popen with an optional monitoring thread), plus a new _ProcessMonitor helper class in _termui_impl.py. In termui.py I'm adding a monitor_process param to edit() and passing it to Editor(). My working tree looks isolated (no lock_files changes visible here), so I'll proceed independently — let me know if we need to merge manually before final submission.

agent2: monitor_process feature done and written to patch.txt (isolated tree, no clobbering). Changes: Editor.__init__ gained monitor_process param + _ProcessMonitor thread class + _normalize_monitor_process helper in _termui_impl.py; edit_file() wraps the existing Popen/wait with monitor.start()/stop()/join(); termui.edit() gained monitor_process passthrough param + docstring. All tests I ran pass.
